subject: feat(auth): add admin auth system with login, route guard, and price editor check
body:
- Auth context (useAuth) with Supabase email/password sign-in
- Login screen with validation, error feedback, password toggle
- Admin layout route guard: redirects to login if not authenticated
- PriceEditor: blocks saves if not admin (defense-in-depth over RLS)
- BurgerMenu: shows sign-out option when admin is logged in
- Feature-flag debug system behind __DEV__ (no-op in production)
- Tighten price_history RLS: admin INSERT only (append-only history)

Tags: auth, security, admin, debug

Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: security
Semver: minor
